## Entities.JournalLibrary.importJournals() method

Imports journal entries from an array. Validates each journal and adds it to the library. Journals that already exist are skipped. Accepts filling and confection journal entries (both edit and production types).

**Signature:**

```typescript
importJournals(journals: ReadonlyArray<unknown>): Result<IJournalImportResult>;
```

</th><th>

</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

journals


</td><td>

ReadonlyArray&lt;unknown&gt;


</td><td>

Array of journal entries to import


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

Result&lt;IJournalImportResult&gt;

`Success` with import results, or `Failure` if validation fails
